rationale_per_step.add-tier-legend-to-search-ui: Feature improvement on UI/UX + discovery: add a compact tier/score legend or explanation affordance in search results. Builds on surfaced scores and centralized tier meta so users understand and trust vector search rankings with minimal noise. Advances 'powerful, intuitive discovery' and 'UI/UX' facets. Selected first for category rebalance after testing-heavy recent history.
rationale_per_step.extend-ci-eval-coverage: Testing/Observability + DX: wire the remaining smoke evals (parse, merged, semantic-search-scenario, orchestrator-mock, and the composite eval:smoke) into the CI verify job so all quality invariants run on every PR/merge. Completes the measurable research quality loop.
rationale_per_step.add-research-evidence-highlighting: Feature improvement / agent research: surface key evidence highlights or source links more prominently in research output and company profiles to strengthen traceability and user trust in 'evidence-backed' outcomes.
